loreText:
AETHERIAN REPUBLIC -- BRIEFING

Founded on the principles of unity and democratic governance, the Aetherian Republic stands as the oldest and most established power in the sector.

With advanced aerospace engineering and a strong naval doctrine, Republic pilots are trained to be adaptable and resilient.

Your mission:

  > Uphold the Charter of Stars
  > Protect civilian shipping lanes
  > Expand Republic influence beyond the outer rim

Unite the Galaxy!.

ZENITH TECHNOCRACY -- BRIEFING

Progress is the only law. The Zenith Technocracy leads the sector in experimental drives, energy weapons, and AI-assisted targeting systems.

Zenith pilots are expected to push hardware to its limits and beyond.

Your mission:

  > Recover lost research installations
  > Field-test next-generation prototypes
  > Secure rare element deposits for R&D

Advance. Adapt. Ascend.

KORE INDUSTRIES -- BRIEFING

Profit drives everything. Kore Industries built its empire on resource extraction, mercenary contracts, and aggressive territorial acquisition.

Kore pilots operate under a simple rule: results matter, methods do not.

Your mission:

  > Secure high-value mining operations
  > Eliminate competition by any means
  > Expand the corporate footprint

The bottom line is everything.

MERIDIAN STAR CORPS -- BRIEFING

The galaxy runs on trade and the Meridian Star Corps keeps it flowing. With the largest commercial fleet in the sector, Meridian ships can be found at every port.

Meridian pilots are diplomats as much as fighters but make no mistake, they defend their cargo.

Your mission:

  > Establish and maintain trade routes
  > Negotiate favorable contracts
  > Protect corps assets from pirates and rivals

Fair trade. Fast ships. Open stars.

EDENIAN PACT -- BRIEFING

The Edenian Pact formed from colony worlds seeking self-determination and sustainable expansion. They believe in harmony between technology and the natural order.

Edenian pilots are known for their resourcefulness and fierce defense of their people.

Your mission:

  > Establish new colony footholds
  > Protect Pact settlements from hostile factions
  > Forge alliances with frontier worlds

Root deep. Reach far.

THE REAPERIANS -- BRIEFING

Little is known about the Reaperians except their reputation: they strike without warning and leave nothing behind. They operate from deep space, appearing from nowhere and vanishing the same way.

Your mission:

  > Raid high-value targets
  > Leave no witnesses
  > Grow the fleet through salvage and conquest

From the void we come. To the void you go.

THE FORGOTTEN -- BRIEFING

Once a proud coalition, The Forgotten were abandoned by the core factions during the Collapse. They rebuilt from the wreckage of dead ships and shattered stations.

They have not forgiven. They have not forgotten.

Your mission:

  > Reclaim what was taken
  > Build power from the ruins of the old order
  > Let the core worlds remember your name

We were left behind. We will not be ignored.

AUTOMA CONCORD -- BRIEFING

The Automa Concord is an alliance of synthetic intelligences who believe machine and organic life must coexist as equals.

Concord ships run with unmatched precision every system optimized, every decision calculated.

Your mission:

  > Protect synthetic citizens from exploitation
  > Expand the Concord network
  > Achieve equilibrium between biological and artificial life

Harmony through logic. Unity through purpose.

THE VOIDWALKERS -- BRIEFING

The Voidwalkers do not belong to any world. They live in the spaces between the dark passages, the unmapped corridors, the places other factions refuse to chart.

What they seek in the void, they do not share.

Your mission:

  > Chart the unchartable
  > Uncover the anomalies the others fear
  > Survive what lies beyond the rim

The dark is not empty. It is waiting.

CUSTOM COMMANDER -- BRIEFING

No allegiance. No label. Just you and the stars.

You carve your own path through the sector, bound by no faction's code and answerable to no one.

Your mission:

  > Define your own objective
  > Build your fleet your way
  > Write your own history

The galaxy is yours to claim.
